title: Delicate Chicken Curry
description: A light and flavorful Indian-inspired dish made with tender chicken and a mix of aromatic spices. Perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Add the chicken breast and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-6 minutes.
Add the curry powder and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Pour in the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Reduce the heat to low and let cook for 10-12 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Serve over delicate rice and top with sour cream, if desired.
